description: As the QA Inspector in an aviation MRO, process four digital torque wrenches (ASSET-CAL-001, ASSET-CAL-002, ASSET-CAL-003, ASSET-CAL-004) that have returned from the metrology lab. For each asset, update the status to 'Ready to Deploy', set the 'Next Calibration Date' to '2027-03-01', and add 'Calibrated by Midwest Metrology' to the Notes field. Upload the corresponding calibration certificate for each tool from '~/Documents/Calibration_Certs/' (e.g., Cert_CAL-001.pdf for ASSET-CAL-001). Do not modify ASSET-CAL-005 or ASSET-CAL-006.
